hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CC_EDIT_FILE" | grep -qE "(routes|endpoints|views|urls)"; then echo "⚠️ Route file changed - remember to restart server"; fi'

bash -c 'changed=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -vE "^web/\.next/|\.pack\.gz|\.cache/"); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then echo "$changed" | xargs git add && git commit -m "auto-commit: Claude Code changes $(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M)"; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Auto-committed $(echo \"$changed\" | wc -l | tr -d \" \") file(s)\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"No source changes to commit\"}"; fi'
